name: Daliso Ngoma — Projects ledger
description: Curated portfolio of live and in-progress projects grouped by category.

categories.title: Websites & Publishing
categories.description: Public sites, brand surfaces, and publishing destinations that are already live or close to launch.

categories.title: Products & Commerce
categories.description: Product builds focused on finance, retail operations, commercial tooling, and purchase workflows.

categories.title: Internal Systems
categories.description: Operator-facing systems and internal control planes that support delivery, governance, and maintenance.

categories.title: Experiments & Tools
categories.description: Smaller experiments and exploratory builds that are still shaping the next product direction.

projects.title: Build by African Techno
projects.summary: Community events website for AI-focused meetups in South Africa.

projects.title: CallGrid
projects.summary: CLI-first telephony governance system for Zoom Phone inventory, validation, migration planning, and operator review.

projects.title: Founder Pressure Test
projects.summary: Mobile-first decision game about founder tradeoffs, pressure, and pacing.

projects.title: LedgerOne
projects.summary: South African personal finance MVP with a ledger-first architecture and bank-connector boundary.

projects.title: AliasOps
projects.summary: Private Cloudflare Workers control plane for managing email routing aliases and audit logs.

projects.title: Daliso.com
projects.summary: Personal website and publishing surface for Daliso Ngoma across work, podcasting, and software projects.

projects.title: Pool Clarity
projects.summary: Weekend-first pool maintenance dashboard with rule-based water analysis, planner workflows, and optional GPT-5.4 photo triage.

projects.title: Price Pilot
projects.summary: Internal Shopify pricing console for catalogue updates, validation, and audit-ready batch changes.

projects.title: Cin7 Price Analyzer
projects.summary: Product pricing anomaly detector with bulk correction for Cin7 Core and DearSystems inventories.

projects.title: EARN Ecosystem Website
projects.summary: Public website for the Enterprising Africa Regional Network, built on React, TypeScript, and Cloudflare Pages.

projects.title: Gear Roulette
projects.summary: Playful product discovery app that recommends XR and creator gear from a short quiz.

projects.title: Repo Workboard
projects.summary: Local dashboard and report generator that scans repos, TODOs, recent source activity, and test coverage gaps.

projects.title: FlashQuote
projects.summary: Offline-first iOS quoting app for freelancers, field technicians, and solo sellers who need to produce clean quotes fast.

projects.title: Commercial Invoice Generator
projects.summary: Lightweight customs-compliant invoice tool for courier-ready export paperwork.

projects.title: The Lombardy Lifestyle Estate
projects.summary: Brochure-plus-operations website for owners, residents, and prospective residents at The Lombardy Lifestyle Estate.

projects.title: EARN OS Change Review
projects.summary: Change review workflow app for African Technopreneurs operational decisions and release governance.

projects.title: Sentiment Trader
projects.summary: BTC sentiment-regime trading MVP with backtesting, paper execution, and a Cloudflare-ready operator dashboard.

projects.title: The Devil's AI Dictionary
projects.summary: Editorial AI glossary available as a website and iOS app, translating hype vocabulary, product labels, and technical terms into sharp plain-English definitions.

projects.title: Action Inbox
projects.summary: Native iOS app for capturing and triaging actions with a fast inbox-first workflow.

projects.title: justsomething.app
projects.summary: Public website for the Just apps family, bringing Just BP, Just Glucose, and Just Weight together under one product surface.

projects.title: HeadsetHire
projects.summary: Static VR/XR headset rental site for South Africa with inventory-led pricing and a structured quote workflow.

projects.title: My Med Routine
projects.summary: Native iOS medication tracking and daily routine reminder app for consistent at-home care.

projects.title: Ops Atlas
projects.summary: Operator companion app for navigating workstreams, systems, and daily field operations on iOS.

projects.title: Universe Unveiled
projects.summary: Spatial astronomy app for iPhone, iPad, and visionOS focused on guided planetary exploration and immersive learning.

projects.title: Just BP
projects.summary: Minimal iOS blood pressure tracker focused on fast entry and clear trend visibility.

projects.title: Just Glucose
projects.summary: Minimal iPhone glucose tracker built for quick readings, clean trends, and zero account setup.

projects.title: Just Weight - No Wait
projects.summary: Fast weight logger for iPhone and Apple Watch with Apple Health support and simple history tracking.

projects.title: It’s a Date — Scheduler
projects.summary: Lightweight iOS scheduler for planning dates, follow-ups, and shared plans with minimal friction.
